description: Internal advisory agent for bank employees. Explains product conditions, recommends suitable products with customer context, and routes to the right branch contact — grounded on the bank's own knowledge.

skills.name: Product Recommendation
skills.description: Match a customer's segment and needs to product conditions and recommend the most suitable product.

skills.name: Contact Routing & Follow-up
skills.description: Find the right internal branch contact for a product and schedule follow-ups via WorkIQ.
